title: melissa pulegium
intro: Melissa pulegium, also known as pennyroyal, is a small perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its tiny, oval-shaped leaves and tiny white flowers. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural insect repellent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of pennyroyal include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress. Pennyroyal can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
